name: Dr. Sabbir Rahman
about: Dr. Sabbir Rahman is a highly experienced Cardiologist with 12 years of expertise in diagnosing and treating heart diseases. He specializes in interventional cardiology and preventive cardiology.

name: Dr. Farhan Hossain
about: Dr. Farhan Hossain is a renowned Neurologist with 9 years of experience treating disorders of the brain and nervous system. He is known for his expertise in epilepsy and stroke management.
education: MBBS, MS - Neurology, Dhaka Medical College

name: Dr. Nusrat Jahan
about: Dr. Nusrat Jahan is a leading Gynecologist with 15 years of experience in women's health. She specializes in high-risk pregnancy and infertility treatment.
education: MBBS, FCPS - Gynecology, Sir Salimullah Medical College

name: Dr. Rafiqul Islam
about: Dr. Rafiqul Islam is an expert Orthopedic Surgeon with 11 years of experience in bone, joint, and muscle disorders. He specializes in joint replacement and sports injury treatment.
education: MBBS, MS - Orthopedics, Chittagong Medical College

name: Dr. Sabrina Sultana
about: Dr. Sabrina Sultana is a skilled Dermatologist with 7 years of experience in skin, hair, and nail disorders. She specializes in cosmetic dermatology and laser treatments.

name: Dr. Imran Karim
about: Dr. Imran Karim is a dedicated Pediatrician with 13 years of experience in child healthcare. He specializes in newborn care, childhood vaccinations, and pediatric infectious diseases.
education: MBBS, FCPS - Pediatrics, Dhaka Shishu Hospital

name: Dr. Tahmina Begum
about: Dr. Tahmina Begum is a compassionate Psychiatrist with 10 years of experience in mental health. She specializes in depression, anxiety disorders, and behavioral therapy.
education: MBBS, MD - Psychiatry, National Institute of Mental Health

name: Dr. Zahirul Haque
about: Dr. Zahirul Haque is a highly skilled Urologist with 16 years of experience in urinary tract and male reproductive system disorders. He specializes in kidney stones and prostate treatment.

name: Dr. Razia Khatun
about: Dr. Razia Khatun is an experienced Ophthalmologist with 8 years of expertise in eye care and vision disorders. She specializes in cataract surgery and glaucoma treatment.
education: MBBS, FCPS - Ophthalmology, Ispahani Islamia Eye Institute
